body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This makes sure we have CMIP runs in our regular CI that cover all combinations of sea ice (prescribed vs ClimaSeaIce) and land (bucket vs integrated) models. This will be helpful as we focus on CMIP runs more.
title: add CMIP with integrated land to CI
